testcase.classname: Destination Service - Unit Tests (Standalone) getTopDestinations should return top destinations with default limit

Error: expect(received).toHaveProperty(path)
Expected path: "popularityScore" Received path: []
Received value: {"attractions": {"activities": [], "culturalHighlights": [], "specialties": [], "top": []}, "categories": [], "climate": {"info": undefined, "weatherData": {}}, "description": "Gods Own Country", "flags": {"ecoFriendly": false, "isFamilyFriendly": false, "isFeatured": true, "isHeritageSite": false, "isPopular": false, "isTrending": false, "isUNESCO": false, "isWildlifeSanctuary": false}, "id": 1, "images": {"featured": undefined, "gallery": [], "main": undefined, "thumbnail": undefined, "video": undefined}, "location": {"country": "India", "latitude": null, "longitude": null, "region": "South India", "state": "Kerala", "timezone": undefined}, "logistics": {"accommodationTypes": [], "howToReach": undefined, "localTransport": undefined, "nearestAirport": undefined, "nearestRailway": undefined}, "name": "Kerala", "nearbyDestinations": [], "pricing": {"budgetCategory": undefined, "max": 0, "min": 0}, "recommendations": {"adventureLevel": undefined, "difficultyLevel": undefined, "duration": undefined}, "relatedDestinations": [], "seo": {"canonicalUrl": undefined, "metaDescription": undefined, "metaKeywords": undefined, "metaTitle": undefined, "ogImage": undefined}, "shortDescription": "Beautiful state", "slug": "kerala", "stats": {"avgRating": 4.5, "popularityScore": 0, "reviewCount": 0, "totalBookings": 100, "tourCount": 10, "viewCount": 0, "wishlistCount": 50}, "timing": {"allSeasons": [], "bestTimeToVisit": undefined, "currentSeason": null, "currentSeasonDescription": null, "offSeason": undefined, "peakSeason": undefined, "recommendedDuration": undefined, "upcomingFestivals": []}, "travelInfo": {"currency": undefined, "localCustoms": undefined, "localLanguage": undefined, "packingSuggestions": [], "safetyInfo": undefined, "timezoneOffset": undefined, "travelTips": undefined}} at Object.toHaveProperty (C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\Sam\Booking Website\ebooking-app\backend\tests\services\destinationService.unit.test.js:53:25) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

testcase.classname: Destination Service - Unit Tests (Standalone) getRelatedDestinations should return related destinations
testcase.name: Destination Service - Unit Tests (Standalone) getRelatedDestinations should return related destinations
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(jest.fn()).toHaveBeenCalledWith(...expected)
- Expected + Received
- StringContaining "WHERE d.id != $1", + " WITH source_dest AS ( SELECT budget_category, adventure_level, activities, region FROM destinations WHERE id = $1 ) SELECT d.*, ( (d.tour_count * 0.25) + (d.avg_rating * 5 * 0.20) + (d.total_bookings * 0.30) + (d.wishlist_count * 0.10) + (CASE WHEN d.is_featured THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.is_trending THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) ) as popularity_score, -- Similarity score ( (CASE WHEN d.budget_category = (SELECT budget_category FROM source_dest) THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.adventure_level = (SELECT adventure_level FROM source_dest) THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.activities && (SELECT activities FROM source_dest) THEN 15 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.region = (SELECT region FROM source_dest) THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) ) as similarity_score FROM destinations d, source_dest WHERE d.is_active = true AND d.id != $1 ORDER BY similarity_score DESC, popularity_score DESC LIMIT $2 ", [1, 4],
Number of calls: 1 at Object.toHaveBeenCalledWith (C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\Sam\Booking Website\ebooking-app\backend\tests\services\destinationService.unit.test.js:290:24) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

{"adventureLevel": undefined, "difficultyLevel": undefined, "duration": undefined}, "relatedDestinations": [], "seo": {"canonicalUrl": undefined, "metaDescription": undefined, "metaKeywords": undefined, "metaTitle": undefined, "ogImage": undefined}, "shortDescription": undefined, "slug": "cochin", "stats": {"avgRating": 4.4, "popularityScore": 0, "reviewCount": 0, "totalBookings": 120, "tourCount": 7, "viewCount": 0, "wishlistCount": 35}, "timing": {"allSeasons": [], "bestTimeToVisit": undefined, "currentSeason": null, "currentSeasonDescription": null, "offSeason": undefined, "peakSeason": undefined, "recommendedDuration": undefined, "upcomingFestivals": []}, "travelInfo": {"currency": undefined, "localCustoms": undefined, "localLanguage": undefined, "packingSuggestions": testcase.classname: Destination Service - Unit Tests getRelatedDestinations should return related destinations based on region and category

testcase.failure:
Error: expect(jest.fn()).toHaveBeenCalledWith(...expected)
- Expected + Received
- StringContaining "WHERE d.id != $1", + " WITH source_dest AS ( SELECT budget_category, adventure_level, activities, region FROM destinations WHERE id = $1 ) SELECT d.*, ( (d.tour_count * 0.25) + (d.avg_rating * 5 * 0.20) + (d.total_bookings * 0.30) + (d.wishlist_count * 0.10) + (CASE WHEN d.is_featured THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.is_trending THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) ) as popularity_score, -- Similarity score ( (CASE WHEN d.budget_category = (SELECT budget_category FROM source_dest) THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.adventure_level = (SELECT adventure_level FROM source_dest) THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.activities && (SELECT activities FROM source_dest) THEN 15 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.region = (SELECT region FROM source_dest) THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) ) as similarity_score FROM destinations d, source_dest WHERE d.is_active = true AND d.id != $1 ORDER BY similarity_score DESC, popularity_score DESC LIMIT $2 ", [1, 4],
Number of calls: 1 at Object.toHaveBeenCalledWith (C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\Sam\Booking Website\ebooking-app\backend\tests\services\destinationService.test.js:232:24) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

testcase.classname: Destination Service - Unit Tests getNearbyDestinations should return destinations within specified radius
testcase.name: Destination Service - Unit Tests getNearbyDestinations should return destinations within specified radius
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(jest.fn()).toHaveBeenCalledWith(...expected)
- Expected + Received
- StringContaining "ST_Distance", + " WITH source_location AS ( SELECT latitude, longitude FROM destinations WHERE id = $1 AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL ), destinations_with_distance AS ( SELECT d.*, ( (d.tour_count * 0.25) + (d.avg_rating * 5 * 0.20) + (d.total_bookings * 0.30) + (d.wishlist_count * 0.10) + (CASE WHEN d.is_featured THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN d.is_trending THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) ) as popularity_score, -- Calculate distance in km using Haversine formula ( 6371 * acos( cos(radians((SELECT latitude FROM source_location))) * cos(radians(d.latitude)) * cos(radians(d.longitude) - radians((SELECT longitude FROM source_location))) + sin(radians((SELECT latitude FROM source_location))) * sin(radians(d.latitude)) ) ) as distance_km FROM destinations d, source_location WHERE d.is_active = true AND d.id != $1 AND d.latitude IS NOT NULL AND d.longitude IS NOT NULL ) SELECT * FROM destinations_with_distance WHERE distance_km <= $2 ORDER BY distance_km ASC, popularity_score DESC LIMIT $3 ", [1, 100, 4],
Number of calls: 1 at Object.toHaveBeenCalledWith (C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\Sam\Booking Website\ebooking-app\backend\tests\services\destinationService.test.js:275:24) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
